title: Scorpion (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Scorpion}}
'''''Scorpion''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in service with the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. The corvette, along with the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Boltthrower]]'', attempted to prevent the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] from boarding the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Libom]]'' and stealing new surveillance probes for the [[Relentless (Sunaj IV)|''Relentless'']]. However, the ''Scorpion'' was destroyed by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] while flying a [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] and the ''Boltthrower''{{'s}} attempts to stop the Rebels failed.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']]
